title: Data API
description: Tools to aid in datapack creation
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/PtBqImP.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) With this datapack I hope to improve [Minecraft](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Minecraft)'s severe lack of tools for developer use
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Data-API) for more information*
Custom Delevopment Support - Custom [durability](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Durability) backport - Custom [enchantment](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Enchanting) backport - Custom [mob](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mob) support - Custom [music disc](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Music_Disc) backport - Custom [smelting](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Smelting) support
Blocks The following [block](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Category:Blocks) types can now be targeted as [entities](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Entity) | List | | :-: | | [![](https://i.imgur.com/ufeE8xC.png "minecraft:anvil")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Anvil) [![](https://i.imgur.com/oUsyolP.png "#minecraft:campfires")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Campfire) [![](https://i.imgur.com/CTbNkoq.png "#minecraft:cauldrons")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cauldron) [![](https://i.imgur.com/MiPnkdj.png "minecraft:chiseled_bookshelf")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Chiseled_Bookshelf) [![](https://i.imgur.com/PsGyFXs.png "minecraft:composter")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Composter) [![](https://i.imgur.com/7EFkcen.png "minecraft:crafting_table")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Crafting_Table) [![](https://i.imgur.com/wX2476f.png "minecraft:enchanting_table")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Enchanting_Table) [![](https://i.imgur.com/RbFqSR6.png "minecraft:fletching_table")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Fletching_Table) [![](https://i.imgur.com/v1MBxaW.png "#minecraft:furnaces")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Furnace_(disambiguation)) [![](https://i.imgur.com/bL8uEk8.png "minecraft:jukebox")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Jukebox) [![](https://i.imgur.com/gXNAgnT.png "minecraft:loom")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Loom) [![](https://i.imgur.com/Aeb8KGV.png "minecraft:smithing_table")](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Smithing_Table) |
NBT Tags - Over 15+ custom NBT tags for item customization including `right-click detection`, `attack detection`, `drop detection`, and more
Objectives - Make entities glow

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) ALSO CHECK OUT ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) | Datapacks | | :-: | | [![](https://i.imgur.com/r2v2UQI.png "Better Babies")](https://modrinth.com/project/W9qgAZfz) [![](https://i.imgur.com/zMxZbG1.png "Caveat")](https://modrinth.com/project/FMLlwNZj) [![](https://i.imgur.com/NzWnHuE.png "Reader")](https://modrinth.com/project/F78KXQyP) [![](https://i.imgur.com/o78n1Rj.png "Vesture")](https://modrinth.com/project/L45eoNGD) |
